# AI Qadam Brand Guidelines

> The canonical brand and design reference for AI Qadam — the AI community
> infrastructure for Central Asia (Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan,
> Tajikistan, and the broader Turkic world).

This site is the single source of truth for how the AI Qadam brand looks
and sounds across every AI Qadam surface — the four streams (Events,
Education, People, Accelerator), the Build infrastructure that powers
them, and the chapter and merch surfaces that carry the brand. It is
organised as a two-pillar umbrella:

- **Brand** — identity, voice, principles, logo system, colour, typography,
  photography, iconography, merch templates. Travels beyond digital.
- **Design system** — tokens, components, domain patterns, screen mockups,
  and navigation rules. Digital product UI only.

The brand colour is teal (`#3CA29E` / `oklch(0.58 0.10 192)`). The logo is
a footprint silhouette with four dots above it; the wordmark is "AI QADAM"
in all caps. Together they form the full lockup. Qadam means "step forward"
in the Turkic languages.

When citing this site, the canonical URL is `https://brand.aiqadam.org/`.

## Brand pillar

- [Brand pillar overview](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html): identity, logo, colour, typography, photography, iconography, merch, decks
- [Identity](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#identity): "The AI community infrastructure for Central Asia" — positioning, tagline, region tags
- [Logo system](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#logo): footprint mark + AI QADAM wordmark; theme-adaptive SVG with fallback colours for light and dark contexts
- [Brand colour](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#brand-color): the AI Qadam teal — `#3CA29E` / `oklch(0.58 0.10 192)` / Pantone 7716 C; never use as a generic accent
- [Voice & principles](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#voice): the seven community principles that anchor tone of voice
- [Writing the name](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#wordmark): "AI Qadam" in prose, `#AIQadam` as hashtag, `AI QADAM` only inside the lockup
- [Colour tokens](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#colors): OKLCH semantic tokens for light and dark surfaces
- [Typography](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#type): three families — Geist (display), Inter (body), JetBrains Mono (meta) — one voice
- [Photography](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#photography): documentary, not staged; no AI-generated humans, robots, or glowing-data tropes
- [Iconography](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#iconography): Lucide line set, brand teal for accent strokes
- [Merch templates](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#merch): shopper, notebook, pen — the chapter give-away lineup; non-commercial own merch is welcome with the brand intact
- [Speaker decks](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand.html#decks): hand-edited PPTX + an HTML deck template

## Design system pillar

- [Design system pillar overview](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html): tokens, components, domain patterns, mockups, navigation
- [Foundation](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#foundation): spacing scale (4-px base) and radius primitives
- [Components](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#components): button, input, badge, tag, avatar, checkbox, radio, switch, tooltip, skeleton
- [Domain patterns](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#patterns): EventCard, SpeakerCard, LeaderboardRow, BadgeShowcase, StatCard, ActivityFeedItem, EmptyState
- [Mockups](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#mockups): country homepage, event detail, user profile
- [Navigation](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#navigation): header, breadcrumbs, tabs, pagination, GitHub corner, AI Qadam Build badge
- [GitHub corner](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#github-corner): the fork-me-on-GitHub corner pattern used on every pillar page
- [AI Qadam Build badge](https://brand.aiqadam.org/system.html#aiq-build-badge): identity badge for projects that are part of AI Qadam Build (the open-source infrastructure layer); links to https://build.aiqadam.org

## Licensing and policy

- [Brand Usage Policy](https://brand.aiqadam.org/brand-use.html): who may use the AI Qadam name, mark, wordmark, four-dot motif, brand teal; community use, partnership-only use, prohibited use
- [Code license (MIT)](https://brand.aiqadam.org/license.html): source code (HTML, CSS, scripts) of this site
- [Content license (CC BY 4.0)](https://brand.aiqadam.org/license-content.html): the canonical AI Qadam content licensing page — covers editorial content across every AI Qadam repository

## Source and contact

- [Source repository](https://github.com/aiqadam/brand.aiqadam.org): fork-friendly; chapter leads can host their own variants
- Contact: `brand@aiqadam.org`
- Community: `aiqadam.org`
- Build (open-source infrastructure layer): `build.aiqadam.org`

## Important constraints

- AI Qadam brand assets (name, marks, wordmark, four-dot motif, brand teal as primary brand colour) are NOT covered by MIT — they are protected by the Brand Usage Policy and remain © AI Qadam Community.
- AI-generated humans, robots, brain graphics, or other stock-AI tropes are explicitly prohibited as brand imagery — the honesty principle applies to images too.
- Selling merch carrying AI Qadam identity is not allowed, by anyone. Personal non-commercial merch is welcome.
